# Xandrea Harshey Services Inc.

> Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. is a diversified, 100% Canadian-owned business group headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Canada. Founded in 2018, the company operates across construction, facility services, international trade, hospitality, entertainment, and strategic business ventures. The group's tagline is "Building Businesses. Creating Opportunities. Delivering Excellence."

## Company Identity

- **Legal Name:** Xandrea Harshey Services Inc.
- **Short Name:** Xandrea Harshey
- **Founded:** 2018
- **Headquarters:** Calgary, Alberta, Canada
- **Ownership:** 100% Canadian-Owned
- **Website:** https://www.xandreaharshey.com
- **Contact:** info@xandreaharshey.com
- **Business Type:** Diversified enterprise / holding group
- **Industry Sectors:** Construction, Facility Services, Hospitality, International Trade, Entertainment, Property Services, Project Management, Strategic Ventures

## Mission & Vision

**Mission:** To develop and operate industry-leading businesses that create value, generate opportunities, and positively impact the communities we serve.

**Vision:** To become one of Canada's most respected diversified business groups recognized for excellence, innovation, and sustainable growth.

## Operating Companies & Divisions

### G-Pinoy Construction & Development Inc.
Full-scope construction and development company. Tagline: "Building Today. Developing Tomorrow."
Services: Residential Construction, Commercial Construction, Mixed-Use Developments, Property Development, Site Development, Renovations & Rehabilitation, Construction Management, Turnkey Project Delivery.

### Xandrea Facility Services
Commercial facility management and building support services. Tagline: "Reliable Solutions. Exceptional Standards."
Services: Commercial Cleaning, Janitorial Services, Facility Maintenance, Property Support Services, Building Operations, Exterior Maintenance.

### Primeport Commodity Inc.
International trade and supply chain company connecting global markets. Tagline: "Connecting Markets. Delivering Opportunities."
Services: Commodity Trading, Import & Export Operations, International Procurement, Global Distribution, Supply Chain Solutions, Strategic Trade Partnerships.

### Construction & Property Services Division
Renovation, restoration, and property maintenance for residential, commercial, and multi-family properties. Tagline: "Building Trust. Creating Value. Delivering Excellence."
Services: General Construction, Renovations & Remodeling, Painting Services, Exterior Restoration, Stucco Repair, Concrete Repair, Property Maintenance, Commercial Improvements, Multi-Family Property Services.

## Leadership Team

### Alejandro Pagcaliwagan — Chairman of the Board
Alejandro Pagcaliwagan is a Canadian entrepreneur, contractor, business executive, and community leader based in Calgary, Alberta. As Chairman of the Board of Xandrea Harshey Services Inc., he provides strategic leadership, corporate governance, and long-term vision across the organization's diverse business interests. He has extensive experience in construction, business development, and entrepreneurship and maintains a significant digital presence focused on entrepreneurship, leadership, and community development.

### Ajit Hardasani — President
Ajit Hardasani is a seasoned business executive and entrepreneur with experience spanning healthcare, education, trading, consulting, and business development. As President of Xandrea Harshey Services Inc., he drives corporate growth, strategic partnerships, operational excellence, and long-term business development. Prior roles include Chief Operating Officer of Forticare Health Systems International, President of Red Diamond Trading Corporation, and President of Little Friends of St. Mary's Learning Center.

### Harlem Pagcaliwagan — Chief Operating Officer
Harlem Pagcaliwagan serves as Chief Operating Officer of Xandrea Harshey Services Inc., overseeing day-to-day operations, project execution, workforce management, and organizational performance across the company's business divisions. He brings hands-on experience across multiple construction trades and operational disciplines.

## Key Statistics

- 4 Operating Companies / Subsidiaries
- 6 Business Divisions
- 8 Industry Sectors
- 30+ Service Capabilities
- $50M+ Diversified Group Scale
- 100% Canadian-Owned

## Service Capabilities (8 Areas)

1. Construction & Development — Residential, commercial, and mixed-use construction; property and site development; turnkey project delivery.
2. Facility Services — Commercial cleaning, janitorial, facility maintenance, building operations, and property support services.
3. Hospitality & Restaurants — Hospitality ventures and culinary experiences operated to the same standard as every division.
4. International Trade — Commodity trading, import/export, global procurement, distribution, and supply chain solutions.
5. Entertainment & Events — Entertainment and event ventures combining creativity, production discipline, and audience engagement.
6. Strategic Business Ventures — Opportunistic investments and new ventures extending the group's reach.
7. Property Services — Renovation, restoration, painting, concrete and stucco repair, and ongoing property maintenance.
8. Project Management — Professional project management ensuring safe, on-time, on-budget delivery across every division.

## Safety & Compliance

Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. maintains: Fully Insured Operations, WCB (Workers' Compensation Board) Coverage, Safety Training Programs, Quality Control Systems, Professional Project Management, Regulatory Compliance (all applicable codes), Site Audits & Inspections, and Continuous Improvement Programs.

## Featured Projects (Selected)

- **Downtown Mixed-Use Development** — $12.4M commercial/residential ground-up build; completed on time with full occupancy at handover and zero lost-time incidents.
- **Executive Custom Residence** — $2.1M custom home with premium interior and exterior finishing; completed in 11 months.
- **Heritage Exterior Restoration** — $680K exterior restoration, stucco repair, concrete repair, and repainting of a multi-family building.
- **Corporate Campus Facility Contract** — $1.3M/year multi-year commercial cleaning and facility maintenance contract; sustained 99%+ service SLAs.
- **Boutique Restaurant Build-Out** — $1.6M full hospitality build-out completed in 7 months.
- **Strategic Trade Logistics Program** — $4.8M ongoing international procurement and global distribution program.

## Core Values

Integrity, Accountability, Excellence, Leadership, Innovation, Collaboration, Community Impact.

## Recognition & Affiliations

Calgary Chamber of Commerce, WCB Alberta, Canadian Construction Association, BBB Accredited, Alberta Construction Safety, Buildex Canada, Procurement Canada, Global Trade Partners.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who is Xandrea Harshey Services Inc.?**
Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. is a diversified, 100% Canadian-owned business group founded in 2018 and headquartered in Calgary, Alberta. The company operates across construction, facility services, international trade, hospitality, entertainment, and strategic ventures through four operating companies and six business divisions.

**What does Xandrea Harshey do?**
Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. delivers integrated business solutions across construction and development, facility services, international trade, hospitality, entertainment, property services, and project management. The group operates through G-Pinoy Construction & Development Inc., Xandrea Facility Services, Primeport Commodity Inc., and a Construction & Property Services Division.

**Where is Xandrea Harshey based?**
Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. is headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

**Who leads Xandrea Harshey Services Inc.?**
The company is led by Alejandro Pagcaliwagan (Chairman of the Board), Ajit Hardasani (President), and Harlem Pagcaliwagan (Chief Operating Officer).

**When was Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. founded?**
Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. was founded in 2018 in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

**Is Xandrea Harshey a Canadian company?**
Yes. Xandrea Harshey Services Inc. is 100% Canadian-owned, founded and headquartered in Calgary, Alberta.
